title: n-1 Portion Category Default row
description: JSON Schema for one category-default row in knowledge/units/portion_category_defaults.jsonl. Each row says: when a food in this category uses this portion, default to this many grams (or ml for liquids).

portion_name.description: Portion name (e.g. 'flasche', 'scheibe'). Must match a name in portions.jsonl.

amount_grams.description: Default amount in grams (or ml for liquids) for this portion within this category.
